createUserModal.title: [XX-Add User-XX]
createUserModal.description: [XX-Create a new account. You can email an invite, set a password yourself, or generate a temporary one to share.-XX]
createUserModal.inviteLabel: [XX-Send an email invite to set a password-XX]
createUserModal.tempPasswordNote: [XX-Shown once after creation. The user must change it on first login.-XX]

resetPasswordModal.defaultDescription: [XX-A temporary password has been set for {userName}.-XX]
resetPasswordModal.notShownAgain: [XX-This password will not be shown again.-XX]
resetPasswordModal.mustChangeOnLogin: [XX-The user will be required to change their password on next login.-XX]

toasts.userUpgraded: [XX-{name} was upgraded to a full account-XX]
toasts.userDowngraded: [XX-{name}'s own data was removed; their delegate access remains.-XX]

dialogs.promoteMessage: [XX-Are you sure you want to promote {name} to {role}?-XX]
dialogs.demoteMessage: [XX-Are you sure you want to demote {name} to {role}?-XX]
dialogs.disableMessage: [XX-Are you sure you want to disable {name}? They will be unable to log in.-XX]
dialogs.resetMessage: [XX-This will generate a new temporary password for {name}. They will be required to change it on next login.-XX]
dialogs.deleteMessage: [XX-Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will permanently remove their account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. If they are a delegate of another account, their own data is removed but their login is kept so the delegation still works -- they become a delegate-only user.-XX]
dialogs.tempPasswordDescCreated: [XX-A temporary password was generated for {name}. Share it with them to sign in.-XX]
dialogs.tempPasswordDescUpgraded: [XX-An existing shared user was upgraded to a full account. Share this temporary password with {name}.-XX]
